fh_freedom.name: Global Freedom score
fh_freedom.note: Political rights & civil liberties (0–100). Higher = freer.

eq_lgbt.name: LGBT Legal Equality Index
eq_lgbt.note: Legal rights for LGBTQ+ people (0–100). Higher = more equal.

wbl_women.name: Women, Business and the Law
wbl_women.note: Laws affecting women's economic opportunity (0–100). Higher = more equal.

homicide.name: Homicide rate
homicide.note: Intentional homicides per 100,000 people. Lower = safer.

uhc.name: UHC Service Coverage Index
uhc.note: Coverage of essential health services (0–100). Higher = better.

life_expectancy.name: Life expectancy at birth
life_expectancy.note: Life expectancy at birth, in years. Higher = better.

internet.name: Individuals using the internet
internet.note: Share of people using the internet. Higher = more connected.

gdp_pc.name: GDP per capita (PPP)
gdp_pc.note: GDP per capita, PPP (international $) — a rough prosperity / cost proxy.
